product.audience: therapist newsletter audience with existing trust
product.promise: Show therapists how they compare to peers and give them ready-to-use templates to act on the findings.

primary_channels.name: owned newsletter launch
primary_channels.why: Existing audience trust makes email the highest-leverage conversion channel.

primary_channels.name: survey-to-sale flywheel
primary_channels.why: Contributors become high-intent buyers and generate the proof used in launch copy.

primary_channels.name: soft-sell newsletter content
primary_channels.why: Pre-launch education warms demand without overusing direct sales emails.
tactics: 2-4 regular issues tied to benchmark topics
problem-aware content on pricing, referrals, and admin

primary_channels.name: webinar or live breakdown
primary_channels.why: Live teaching helps convert high-intent readers and surfaces objections.

secondary_channels.name: partner cross-promotions
secondary_channels.why: Trusted adjacent creators can extend reach into similar therapist audiences.

secondary_channels.name: community distribution
secondary_channels.why: Useful benchmark insights can travel in therapist groups when framed as value-first content.

secondary_channels.name: social proof content
secondary_channels.why: Short-form insight assets can reinforce launch messaging and drive readers back to email or the sales page.

packaging: optional higher tier with live walkthrough or office hours

key_messages: How do I compare to similar therapists?
Get the benchmark plus ready-to-use templates.
Built for therapists, not generic businesses.
Save time and make better practice decisions.

execution_timeline.week_1: Design survey, define benchmark categories, recruit contributors.
execution_timeline.week_2: Analyze data, build visuals, draft templates, open waitlist.
execution_timeline.week_3: Publish warm-up content, finalize sales page, recruit partners, schedule webinar.
execution_timeline.week_4: Run launch emails, host webinar, send deadline sequence, collect feedback.
